Privacy Policy

Resourcehip Ltd · Version 1.0 · April 2026

Resourcehip Ltd ("Resourcehip", "we", "us") is registered in Scotland, United Kingdom (Company No. [to be added]). We publish independent material resilience ratings for consumer product categories and licence the HIP Mark trust mark.

Data controller: Resourcehip Ltd · ICO Registration No.: [to be added] · Contact: [email to be added]

1. What data we collect and why

Analytics

We use Cloudflare Web Analytics — a cookieless service that collects no personal data. Only aggregated, anonymised traffic data is collected (page views, referrer, approximate country). No cookie is placed on your device. No individual tracking occurs. No consent is required.

Contact enquiries

If you contact us by email or through a contact form, we collect your name and email address to respond to your enquiry. We retain correspondence for 12 months, then delete it. Legal basis: Legitimate interest.

Business and licensing enquiries

If you enquire about HIP Mark licensing or a product rating, we collect your name, business name, email, and enquiry details. We retain this for 3 years. Legal basis: Pre-contractual steps / legitimate interest.

What we do not collect

We do not collect payment card details, sensitive personal data, or government identifiers. We do not use advertising cookies, tracking pixels, or third-party marketing tools. We do not sell your data.

2. Cookies

This website does not use cookies. Cloudflare Web Analytics is cookieless. No cookie consent banner is shown because none is needed.

See our Cookies & AI Transparency Notice for full details.

3. Third parties

Provider Purpose Location
Cloudflare Inc. Website hosting (Cloudflare Pages) and analytics USA — Standard Contractual Clauses
GitHub Inc. Source code repository (website content stored here) USA — Standard Contractual Clauses

No other third parties receive your personal data. The UK–EU adequacy decision was renewed in December 2025 and remains in force until 2031.

4. Your rights under UK GDPR

You have the right to: access the data we hold · correct inaccurate data · request deletion · object to processing · data portability · lodge a complaint with the ICO (ico.org.uk).

To exercise any right, email [email to be added]. We will respond within one month.

5. Data security

Our website is served over HTTPS. We do not store personal data on local servers beyond what is needed for correspondence.

6. Changes

We will update this policy if our data practices change. The version date is shown at the top. The current version is always at resourcehip.com/privacy.

7. Governing law

This policy is governed by Scots law. Disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Scottish courts.

8. Contact

Resourcehip Ltd · [address to be added] · [email to be added]
